_comment: Copy this to config.json and paste your two free keys in. Both take about two minutes to get and neither ever expires or charges.
_pexels: Get a key at https://www.pexels.com/api/ (200 requests per hour, free forever)
_pixabay: Get a key at https://pixabay.com/api/docs/ (100 requests per minute, free forever)
_contact: Optional. A URL or email that identifies you to the public archives. Wikimedia requires contact details in the User-Agent and blocks requests without them. The default points at the project repo, which is fine for personal use.
_gemini: Optional. Free key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey — only needed if you want to generate sheets from a script.
_gemini_model: "auto" asks your key which models it can call and picks the best Flash one. Only pin a name here if you want a specific model.
